source_note: Wyoming Statutes Title 24 §24-1-134 designates US Highway 14-Alternate between Cody and Powell as the Wyoming Veterans Memorial Highway.

highway_name: Wyoming Vietnam Veterans Welcome Home Highway
source_note: Wyoming Statutes Title 24 §24-1-135 designates I-25 between the Colorado border and Buffalo as the Wyoming Vietnam Veterans Welcome Home Highway.
Wyoming Statutes Title 24 §24-1-136 designates State Highway 28 between the Fremont County line and the Shoshone National Forest boundary as the Wyoming Women's Suffrage Pathway.
